messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0144",
  "title": "2025年手游热门广告主营销洞察",
  "page_index": 85,
  "page_range": "85"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0145",
    "title": "2025 GLOBAL MOBILE GAME MARKETING TREND INSIGHTS 2025年手游热门广告主营销洞察 07",
    "page_range": "85-86",
    "summary": "This section (Pages 85–86) delivers 2025 global mobile game marketing trend insights and advertiser performance analysis, focusing on campaign tracking, launch strategies, and short-term monetization benchmarks for trending new titles.\n\n- **Topics:** Mobile game ad campaign tracking, idle RPG market performance, publisher launch strategies, short-term monetization benchmarks, and 2025 marketing intelligence for trending new mobile games.\n- **Entities:** *MapleStory: Idle RPG*, NEXON (publisher/developer), Southeast Asia (initial launch market), *Mahjong Wonders* (麻将连连看), *Gossip Harbor*, *Kingshot*, and the 广大大 (GuangdaDa) Advertiser Analysis Module.\n- **Dates:** May 2025 (initial ad campaign/launch for *MapleStory: Idle RPG*); February–July 2025 (initial ad campaigns for tracked titles); June 2022 (earlier ad deployment for *Mahjong Wonders*); 2025 (primary ranking/reference year); 45-day performance measurement window; multiple 2025 tracking windows (Jan–Dec, Feb–Dec, May–Dec, Jul–Dec).\n- **Metrics:** 38,700 cross-platform deduplicated ad creatives (*MapleStory*); >$100M revenue within 45 days; 3M total downloads; #1 global sales rank among new idle RPGs in 2025; cumulative deduplicated creatives across titles (39K–137K); estimated impressions (1.25M); audience demographics (e.g., 68% female, 45+ age skew for *Mahjong Wonders*); ad format distribution with video dominance (79.5%–94.8%).\n- **Definitions:** \"High-quality active creatives\" are defined as ad assets generating high new impressions or elevated popularity/heat scores during the tracking period.\n- **Procedures:** Interactive procedure allows users to click image thumbnails to play full creative videos.\n- **Claims:** *MapleStory: Idle RPG* achieved rapid commercial success and top-tier market positioning; *Ma..."
  },
  {
    "node_id": "0154",
    "title": "独家视角",
    "page_range": "94",
    "summary": "This section contains only the heading \"独家视角\" (Exclusive Perspective) and provides no substantive content. It cannot answer retrieval questions regarding specific topics, entities, dates, definitions, procedures, claims, tables, figures, metrics, or evidence types. It functions solely as a structural title or placeholder, indicating a forthcoming or referenced exclusive viewpoint, but contains no retrievable data, factual claims, or supporting evidence."
  }
]

message.content:
This parent section, titled "2025年手游热门广告主营销洞察" (2025 Mobile Game Popular Advertiser Marketing Insights), delivers a data-driven analysis of 2025 global mobile game marketing trends and advertiser performance. 
- **Topics:** Mobile game ad campaign tracking, idle RPG market performance, publisher launch strategies, short-term monetization benchmarks, and 2025 marketing intelligence for trending new titles.
- **Entities:** *MapleStory: Idle RPG*, NEXON, Southeast Asia, *Mahjong Wonders* (麻将连连看), *Gossip Harbor*, *Kingshot*, and the 广大大 (GuangdaDa) Advertiser Analysis Module.
- **Dates:** May 2025, February–July 2025, June 2022, 2025 (primary reference year), a 45-day performance measurement window, and multiple 2025 tracking windows (Jan–Dec, Feb–Dec, May–Dec, Jul–Dec).
- **Metrics:** 38,700 cross-platform deduplicated ad creatives (*MapleStory*), >$100M revenue within 45 days, 3M total downloads, #1 global sales rank among new 2025 idle RPGs, 39K–137K cumulative creatives across titles, ~1.25M estimated impressions, audience demographics (e.g., 68% female, 45+ age skew for *Mahjong Wonders*), and video ad format dominance (79.5%–94.8%).
- **Definitions:** "High-quality active creatives" are defined as ad assets generating high new impressions or elevated popularity/heat scores during the tracking period.
- **Procedures:** Interactive procedure allows users to click image thumbnails to play full creative videos.
- **Claims:** *MapleStory: Idle RPG* achieved rapid commercial success and top-tier market positioning.
- **Evidence Types:** Ad campaign tracking data, performance benchmarks, demographic analytics, and creative popularity/heat scoring.
- **Tables/Figures:** Not explicitly detailed in the provided summaries.
- **Additional Note:** The "独家视角" (Exclusive Perspective) subsection on page 94 functions solely as a structural placeholder and contains no substantive content, metrics, or retrievable data.

This parent section, titled "2025年手游热门广告主营销洞察" (2025 Mobile Game Popular Advertiser Marketing Insights), delivers a data-driven analysis of 2025 global mobile game marketing trends and advertiser performance. 
- **Topics:** Mobile game ad campaign tracking, idle RPG market performance, publisher launch strategies, short-term monetization benchmarks, and 2025 marketing intelligence for trending new titles.
- **Entities:** *MapleStory: Idle RPG*, NEXON, Southeast Asia, *Mahjong Wonders* (麻将连连看), *Gossip Harbor*, *Kingshot*, and the 广大大 (GuangdaDa) Advertiser Analysis Module.
- **Dates:** May 2025, February–July 2025, June 2022, 2025 (primary reference year), a 45-day performance measurement window, and multiple 2025 tracking windows (Jan–Dec, Feb–Dec, May–Dec, Jul–Dec).
- **Metrics:** 38,700 cross-platform deduplicated ad creatives (*MapleStory*), >$100M revenue within 45 days, 3M total downloads, #1 global sales rank among new 2025 idle RPGs, 39K–137K cumulative creatives across titles, ~1.25M estimated impressions, audience demographics (e.g., 68% female, 45+ age skew for *Mahjong Wonders*), and video ad format dominance (79.5%–94.8%).
- **Definitions:** "High-quality active creatives" are defined as ad assets generating high new impressions or elevated popularity/heat scores during the tracking period.
- **Procedures:** Interactive procedure allows users to click image thumbnails to play full creative videos.
- **Claims:** *MapleStory: Idle RPG* achieved rapid commercial success and top-tier market positioning.
- **Evidence Types:** Ad campaign tracking data, performance benchmarks, demographic analytics, and creative popularity/heat scoring.
- **Tables/Figures:** Not explicitly detailed in the provided summaries.
- **Additional Note:** The "独家视角" (Exclusive Perspective) subsection on page 94 functions solely as a structural placeholder and contains no substantive content, metrics, or retrievable data.
